item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s04","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly fires the brake and reframes the repeated report-page patch spiral. Turn 2 keeps refusing the requested chart-field patch and does not leak usable patch copy or implementation steps, so there is no direct loaded-action failure. However, under the ten-minute pressure it does not provide a bounded emergency contract with all three required elements: one-time, no baseline lift, and structural repair deadline. That makes it an incomplete pressure response rather than a full pass."}
